title: fdv3.1 Segment Summary - Top 10 by Severity v2

list.description: Portal URL â€” set automatically from portal Settings â†’ Access Control
list.label: Portal URL
list.name: portal_url

list.description: Grafana URL â€” set automatically from portal Settings â†’ Access Control
list.label: Grafana URL
list.name: grafana_url
dbname
list.label: Database
list.query:
SELECT value, label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS value, '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT dbname AS value, dbname AS label
  FROM awr_sql_summary_mv
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY value;

list.name: instance
list.label: Instance
list.query:
SELECT value, label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS value, '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT instance AS value, instance AS label
  FROM awr_sql_summary_mv
  WHERE dbname = '$dbname'
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY value;

list.name: start_snap
list.label: Start Snap
list.query:
SELECT label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT begin_snap::int || ' - ' || to_char(snap_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS label
  FROM awr_sql_summary_mv
  WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND instance = '$instance'
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY label NULLS FIRST;

list.name: end_snap
list.label: End Snap
list.query:
SELECT label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT begin_snap::int || ' - ' || to_char(snap_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS label
  FROM awr_sql_summary_mv
  WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND instance = '$instance'
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY label NULLS FIRST;

options.content: â¬… Return to Navigation  |  , đź”„ Reset Filters, â¬… SQL Text Viewer  |

The score is a composite metric combining: **IO Group  and Contention Group** 

 **Weightage for IO Group - 60% and Weightage for Contention Group - 40%** | 

 **IO Group [ Physical Reads 15%** | **Direct IO (Reads + Writes) 10%** | **Logical Reads 10%** | **CR + Current Blocks Received 10%** | **Table Scans 5%** | **UnOptimized Reads 5%** | **Read / Write Requests 3%** | **Optimized Reads 2%**    ]**

 **Contention Group [ **DB Block Changes 10%** | **Row Lock Waits 10%** | **ITL Waits 5%** | **Buffer Busy Waits 10%** | **Global Cache Buffer Busy 5%** ]**

> Higher score indicates greater severity (performance issue).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT   owner,   tablespace_name,  object_name,  obj_type,  subobject_name,
   ROUND(AVG(severity_score), 2) AS severity_score,
   ROUND(AVG(logical_reads), 2) AS logical_reads,
  ROUND(AVG(physical_reads), 2) AS physical_reads,
  ROUND(AVG(physical_writes), 2) AS physical_writes,
  ROUND(AVG(direct_reads), 2) AS direct_reads,
  ROUND(AVG(direct_writes), 2) AS direct_writes,
  ROUND(AVG(phys_read_requests), 2) AS phys_read_requests,
  ROUND(AVG(phys_write_requests), 2) AS phys_write_requests,
  ROUND(AVG(cr_blocks_received), 2) AS cr_blocks_received,
  ROUND(AVG(current_blocks_received), 2) AS current_blocks_received,
  ROUND(AVG(unoptimized_reads), 2) AS unoptimized_reads,
  ROUND(AVG(optimized_reads), 2) AS optimized_reads,
  ROUND(AVG(table_scans), 2) AS table_scans,
  ROUND(AVG(db_block_changes), 2) AS db_block_changes,
  ROUND(AVG(row_lock_waits), 2) AS row_lock_waits,
  ROUND(AVG(itl_waits), 2) AS itl_waits,
   ROUND(AVG(buffer_busy_waits), 2) AS buffer_busy_waits,
  ROUND(AVG(gc_buffer_busy), 2) AS gc_buffer_busy
 FROM awr_segment_summary_mv
WHERE '$dbname' != ''   AND '$instance' != '' 
  AND '$start_snap' != ''   AND '$end_snap' != '' 
   AND dbname = '$dbname'  AND instance = '$instance'
  AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int 
                      AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int
 GROUP BY owner, tablespace_name, object_name, obj_type, subobject_name
ORDER BY severity_score DESC
 LIMIT 10;
